name: MangaBat
customLogicReason: Overrides getListPage (bespoke `div.list-comic-item-wrap`/`div.itemupdate` list markup + `?type=&state=&page=` genre grammar), fetchAvailableTags (`td a[href*=/genre/]`), and getChapters (paginated JSON `/api/manga/{slug}/chapters` API with ISO `updated_at` dates + limit/offset). Also strips gzip Accept-Encoding via an OkHttp interceptor. The generic HTML pipeline cannot express the JSON chapter API or the custom card markup — needs a per-source escape hatch.

name: MangaIro
customLogicReason: Overrides getListPage (bespoke `/manga-list/type-{sort}/ctg-{tag}/state-{state}/page-{n}` path grammar + `div.story-item` markup), fetchAvailableTags (`div.panel_category a`, ctg- key extraction), and getDetails (`ul.story_info_right` layout + `page-` tag-key quirk). The generic listing/genre URL grammar and detail selectors do not match — needs a per-source escape hatch. Selectors below are recorded for reference but the URL/tag grammar is not selector-expressible.

name: Mangakakalot.gg
customLogicReason: Overrides getListPage (Vietnamese-diacritic `change_alias` search normaliser + `/genre/{tag}?page=&type=&state=` grammar), fetchAvailableTags (with a hard-coded FALLBACK_TAGS list of ~40 genres), and getChapters (per-row date-format sniffing: `MMM-dd-yy` when the date contains '-', else base pattern). The search normaliser and per-row date sniffing are imperative, not selector-expressible — needs a per-source escape hatch.

name: Mangakakalot.tv
customLogicReason: Overrides getListPage (empty listUrl/searchUrl + bespoke `div.list-comic-item-wrap` markup), getDetails (`div#contentBox` description scrub + JSON chapter API), fetchChaptersApi (paginated `/api/manga/{slug}/chapters` limit/offset with ISO `updated_at`), and fetchAvailableTags (`ul.tag.tag-name li a`). The JSON chapter API and empty-listUrl browse path are not expressible in the generic HTML pipeline — needs a per-source escape hatch.
